fields.title: Financial Institutions and Markets
fields.description: Analysis of the structure, behavior, and performance of financial institutions and markets, with a focus on efficiency, regulation, and their role in economic development.

fields.title: Microfinance
fields.description: Study of microfinance institutions and instruments aimed at providing financial services to underserved populations, emphasizing sustainability, outreach, and impact on poverty reduction.

fields.title: Financial Inclusion
fields.description: Research on access to and usage of formal financial services, examining policy frameworks, digital finance, and inclusion strategies for marginalized and low-income groups.

fields.title: Corporate Governance
fields.description: Investigation of governance mechanisms, ownership structures, and board dynamics, and their effects on firm performance, accountability, and stakeholder protection.

fields.title: Risk Management
fields.description: Assessment of financial, operational, and market risks faced by firms and financial institutions, focusing on measurement, mitigation strategies, and regulatory compliance.
